title: anil angulosa
intro: Anil angulosa, also known as Kalmegh, is a plant species in the family Apiaceae, commonly found in tropical regions of Asia. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which can help to treat a range of health issues. The health benefits of Anil angulosa include its ability to boost the immune system, reduce fever, and alleviate digestive problems. Anil angulosa can be prepared as an herbal decoction or a powder, and it is also used in Ayurvedic medicine to treat various ailments.
